meta.title: e-Visa Kyrgyz Republic — Official Electronic Visa Portal
meta.description: Apply for an electronic visa to the Kyrgyz Republic. Fast, secure, and fully online. Issued by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

hero.title: Your Gateway to Kyrgyzstan
hero.subtitle: Apply for your electronic visa in minutes. Fully online, secure, and issued by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Kyrgyz Republic.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get your e-Visa in 3 simple steps

step1.title: Fill the Form
step1.description: Complete the online application with your personal and travel details. Takes about 5 minutes.

step2.title: Upload Documents
step2.description: Upload a passport photo and a scan of your passport's data page. We accept JPEG and PNG.

step3.title: Pay & Receive
step3.description: Pay the visa fee securely online. Receive your approved e-Visa by email within 3 business days.

eligibility.title: Do I Need a Visa?
eligibility.subtitle: Check if you need an e-Visa based on your nationality

results.visaFreeDesc: Citizens of {country} can enter Kyrgyzstan visa-free for up to {days} days.
results.eVisaDesc: Citizens of {country} can apply for an e-Visa online. Processing takes 3 business days.
results.embassyDesc: Citizens of {country} need to apply at a Kyrgyz embassy or consulate.

q1.question: How long does it take to process an e-Visa?
q1.answer: Processing typically takes 3 business days from the date of submission. In peak seasons, it may take up to 5 business days.

q2.question: What documents do I need to apply?
q2.answer: You need a valid passport (with at least 6 months validity), a passport-size digital photo, and a scanned copy of your passport's data page.

q3.question: Can I extend my e-Visa once in Kyrgyzstan?
q3.answer: E-Visas cannot be extended. If you wish to stay longer, you must apply for a new visa or visit the nearest migration service office.

q4.question: What payment methods are accepted?
q4.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and UnionPay credit and debit cards. All transactions are processed securely.

q5.question: Is the e-Visa valid for multiple entries?
q5.answer: The standard e-Visa is single entry. For multiple entries, you may need to apply through a Kyrgyz embassy.
